methods.method_name: Analysis of Biosynthetic Gene Sequences (NRPS and PKS-II)
methods.description: Analysis of NRPS and PKS-II gene sequences from bacterial strains using bioinformatics tools to determine sequence identity, identify conserved domains, and perform phylogenetic analysis for predicting biosynthetic potential.

steps.description: Perform Blastx analysis on NRPS and PKS-II sequences to determine identity to closest hits from the Blastx analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Blastx analysis on gene sequences

steps.description: Align obtained amino acid sequences partially to conserved domains of annotated NRPS sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: Align amino acid sequences to conserved domains

steps.description: Perform phylogenetic analysis (Neighbor-Joining) of amino acid sequences deduced from five PKS-II fragments with reference sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform phylogenetic analysis (Neighbor-Joining) on amino acid sequences

steps.description: Predict the biosynthetic potential of the strains based on sequence similarity and phylogenetic clustering of PKS-II sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: Predict biosynthetic potential based on sequence analysis and phylogeny

methods.description: Analysis of secondary metabolites present in crude extracts from bacterial fermentation broth using Liquid Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry-Quadrupole-Time of Flight (LC-MS-Q-TOF).

steps.description: Fermentation of three isolates (JJ21, JJ23, JJ42) that showed antibacterial activity and biosynthetic potential.
Preparation of crude extract from the spent broth of three strains JJ21, JJ23 and JJ42.
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare crude extract from spent broth

steps.description: Analysis of crude extract using LC-MS-Q-TOF.
Identification and listing of compounds found in the crude extract from LC-MS-Q-TOF data (A total of 23 different compounds were found).

methods.method_name: Antibacterial Compound Purification and 1H NMR Analysis
methods.description: Isolation and purification of specific antibacterial compounds from bacterial culture broth, followed by structural analysis using 1H Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) spectroscopy and comparison to known compounds.

steps.description: Purification and isolation of two antibacterial compounds (OBLC-02 and OBLC-03) from the culture broth of Streptomyces sp. JJ21.
steps.searchable_summary: Purify and isolate compounds from culture broth
inputs: Bacterial culture broth (from Streptomyces sp. JJ21)

steps.description: Acquisition of 1H NMR spectrum for isolated compounds (OBLC-02 and OBLC-03).
Comparison of 1H NMR data of isolated compounds with reported 1H NMR data for known compounds (e.g., octalactin) for partial structural confirmation.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare NMR data with reported data
inputs: Reported 1H NMR data for known compounds
